newTests.name: should delete stale section comments when no section comments should be published
should create separate collapsible comments for enabled sections
should render a truncation note when remote report link is unavailable
should update existing summary and section comments when their markers already exist
should truncate oversized section comments and append More link
should omit comments for sections without matching tests
should parse comma and newline separated values in canonical order
should publish enabled sections as separate collapsible comments
should render enabled sections without per-test links when summaries do not expose them
